since_last: 57% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.85%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 57% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.22% · BTC +1.99% · Gold +0.04% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 57% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.85%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.85%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.21%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +4.53%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +4.53%, PLTR +3.79%, ADBE +2.74%, ADBE +2.74%, INTU +1.69%. Laggards: BIDU -4.36%, MU -2.76%, ARM -2.27%, MRVL -2.24%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.68% at $158.61
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.68% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
